reads.description: Customers list ('Who owes me?'). UI binds to repo.watchCustomers() -> List<CustomerView>. CustomerView is a per-customer aggregate the frontend computes CLIENT-SIDE by joining the Customer row with its debts/payments/reminders (AppRepository.watchCustomers combineLatest4 over customers+debts+payments+reminders). The base persisted entity is Customer (drift table Customers); the aggregate fields (owed, debtCount, worstStatus, lastActivityAt, lastPaymentAt, lastReminderAt, earliestOverdueDue) are derived, not stored. A server list endpoint should return the Customer row plus these computed aggregates so the client can drop the local join. Money is integer kobo on the wire (Supersede S-1; drift stores whole-naira 'owed' today). Ids become client-minted UUIDv7 strings (Supersede S-2; drift uses int autoincrement today).

fields.name: id
fields.note: drift: int autoIncrement as-built; target UUIDv7 string per S-2. Row tap routes /customers/:id.

fields.name: phone
fields.note: Customer.phone; drift default '' (non-null, may be empty). Client-side searchable by digits; rendered via formatPhone().

fields.name: address
fields.note: Customer.address; not shown on this list but part of the entity.

fields.name: note
fields.note: Customer.note; not shown on this list but part of the entity.

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.note: Customer.updatedAt; sync updatedAt seam per conventions.

fields.name: owed
fields.note: CustomerView.owed — outstanding/balance. Sum of remaining across this customer's non-archived debts. Integer kobo on wire (S-1). Drives amount, 'owing' filter, 'most owed' sort, and the summary strip total.

fields.name: debtCount
fields.note: CustomerView.debtCount — count of this customer's debts with remaining > 0 (open debts).

fields.name: worstStatus
fields.note: CustomerView.worstStatus — highest-severity status among open debts; 'paid' when none open. Drives status chip, overdue red edge, 'overdue'/'paid up' filters.

fields.name: lastActivityAt
fields.note: CustomerView.lastActivityAt — latest of last debt/payment/reminder, falling back to createdAt. Drives 'recently active' sort and the row's relative-time line.

fields.name: lastPaymentAt
fields.note: CustomerView.lastPaymentAt — latest payment createdAt across their debts; disambiguates the row verb ('Paid ...').

fields.name: lastReminderAt
fields.note: CustomerView.lastReminderAt — latest sent reminder sentAt across their debts; disambiguates the row verb ('Reminded ...').

fields.name: earliestOverdueDue
fields.note: CustomerView.earliestOverdueDue — oldest missed due date among open debts; drives 'Overdue Nd' label.

filtersOrSort: sort:Most owed (_Sort.mostOwed — owed desc; also the default server-side sort in watchCustomers)
reads.paginationNote: No pagination today — watchCustomers() streams ALL customers and filter/sort/search are applied entirely client-side over the full list. FLAG: an active trader's customer roster is unbounded, so a server list endpoint SHOULD support cursor pagination (conventions: ?cursor&limit, Paginated<T>). If pagination is added, the four filters, three sorts, and name/phone search must move server-side too (they cannot be applied client-side over a partial page).

authContext.note: Read-only list; both roles may view customers (conventions: staff can read/write debts and customers). Tenant-scoped by businessId. This screen fires no mutations itself — swipe/tap actions only navigate (/customers/add, /customers/:id, /reminders/send/:debtId, /debts/:id/pay) and are covered by other screens' fragments.

special.note: Offline-first live stream (drift StreamBuilder) — locally reactive, not a server realtime channel.

uiStatesHandled: loading (no snapshot data yet — renders as empty list until stream emits)
empty (all.isEmpty && hasData -> _CustomersEmpty 'No customers yet' + Add customer CTA)
populated (list of CustomerListRow with avatar, name, formatted phone, owed amount, status chip, last-activity line)
overdue-emphasis (worstStatus == overdue -> red left edge, red amount, 'Overdue Nd' label)
